Terms of service

Last Updated: May 25, 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to the Rework Store ("Service"), operated and maintained by YoNi Corporation ("YoNi Corporation", "we", "our", or "us"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Rework Store, including all associated services, software, applications, websites, content, updates, features, and community systems.

By accessing or using the Rework Store, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.

The Rework Store is a platform dedicated to reviving, modernizing, preserving, and improving classic software experiences, legacy digital ecosystems, community-driven projects, and related services.

2. Eligibility

To use the Service, you must:

  • Have the legal capacity to agree to these Terms;
  • Comply with all applicable laws and regulations.

If you are under the age of majority in your jurisdiction, you must obtain permission from a parent or legal guardian before using the Service.

3. User Accounts

Certain features of the Rework Store may require an account.

You are responsible for:

  • Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials;
  • All activity occurring under your account;
  • Providing accurate and up-to-date information.

You agree not to:

  • Use another person’s account without permission;
  • Attempt to bypass authentication or security systems.

YoNi Corporation reserves the right to suspend, restrict, or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

4. Acceptable Use Policy

You agree to use the Service responsibly and respectfully.

The following activities are strictly prohibited:

  • Uploading malicious software, malware, spyware, or harmful code;
  • Attempting unauthorized access to servers, systems, or user accounts;
  • Disrupting or interfering with the stability of the Service;
  • Harassing, threatening, or abusing other users;
  • Distributing illegal, harmful, hateful, violent, or sexually explicit content;
  • Engaging in scams, fraud, phishing, impersonation, or deceptive practices;
  • Violating intellectual property rights;
  • Exploiting bugs, vulnerabilities, or unintended features.

YoNi Corporation may investigate and take action against violations at its sole discretion.

5. Intellectual Property

All trademarks, branding, logos, software, designs, graphics, text, interfaces, audiovisual materials, and other content related to the Rework Store are owned by or licensed to YoNi Corporation unless otherwise stated.

You may not:

  • Copy, reproduce, distribute, or modify Service content without permission;
  • Reverse engineer proprietary systems unless permitted by law;
  • Remove copyright notices or branding;
  • Use Rework branding in misleading or unauthorized ways.

Any unauthorized use may result in legal action.

6. User-Generated Content

Users may submit content including comments, uploads, feedback, profile information, or other materials ("User Content").

By submitting User Content, you grant YoNi Corporation a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to host, store, display, reproduce, modify, and distribute such content solely for operating, improving, and promoting the Service.

You remain responsible for your User Content and represent that:

  • You own or have rights to the content;
  • The content does not violate laws or third-party rights;
  • The content is not misleading, harmful, or illegal.

YoNi Corporation reserves the right to remove any User Content at any time.

7. Software & Updates

The Rework Store may provide software downloads, updates, patches, modifications, and experimental features.

By using the Service, you acknowledge that:

  • Software may contain bugs or unfinished features;
  • Updates may modify or remove functionality;
  • Compatibility with all systems cannot be guaranteed.

YoNi Corporation may deploy updates automatically where applicable.

8. Third-Party Services

The Service may include integrations, links, or references to third-party websites, services, applications, or content.

YoNi Corporation does not control third-party services and is not responsible for:

  • Their availability;
  • Their content;
  • Their privacy practices;
  • Any damages or losses related to third-party use.

Your use of third-party services is governed by their own terms and policies.

9. Purchases & Digital Goods

Certain features or content may require payment.

By making a purchase, you agree that:

  • Payments are final unless required otherwise by law;
  • Digital products may be revoked if obtained fraudulently;
  • Prices may change at any time;
  • Taxes may apply depending on your jurisdiction.

YoNi Corporation reserves the right to refuse or cancel transactions suspected of fraud or abuse.

10. Refund Policy

Unless otherwise required by applicable law, digital purchases made through the Rework Store are non-refundable.

Refund requests may be reviewed on a case-by-case basis. Abuse of the refund system may result in account restrictions.

11. Privacy

Your privacy is important to us.

By using the Service, you acknowledge that certain information may be collected, processed, and stored for:

  • Account management;
  • Security purposes;
  • Service functionality;
  • Analytics and performance improvements.

YoNi Corporation takes reasonable measures to protect user data but cannot guarantee absolute security.

12. Service Availability

YoNi Corporation does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free access to the Service.

The Service may be:

  • Temporarily unavailable due to maintenance;
  • Modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time;
  • Affected by technical issues beyond our control.

We are not liable for interruptions or loss of access.

13. Termination

YoNi Corporation reserves the right to suspend or terminate access to the Service at any time, with or without notice.

  • Violations of these Terms;
  • Illegal activities;
  • Security risks;
  • Abuse of the platform.

Upon termination, your right to use the Service immediately ends.

14. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Rework Store and all associated services are provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind.

YoNi Corporation disclaims all warranties, including but not limited to:

  • Merchantability;
  • Fitness for a particular purpose;
  • Non-infringement;
  • Reliability or availability.

Use of the Service is at your own risk.

15. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, YoNi Corporation shall not be liable for:

  • Indirect or consequential damages;
  • Data loss;
  • Lost profits;
  • System failures;
  • Security incidents;
  • Unauthorized access.

In no event shall YoNi Corporation’s total liability exceed the amount paid by the user to the Service within the previous 12 months.

16. Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless YoNi Corporation, its affiliates, employees, moderators, partners, and contributors from claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or expenses arising from:

  • Your use of the Service;
  • Your violation of these Terms;
  • Your violation of applicable laws or third-party rights.

17. Changes to the Terms

YoNi Corporation may modify these Terms at any time.

Updated Terms become effective once published through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes means you accept the revised Terms.

Users are encouraged to review the Terms regularly.

18. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with applicable international and local laws.

Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Service shall be handled in the appropriate legal jurisdiction determined by YoNi Corporation.

19. Community Guidelines

Users interacting with Rework communities, social platforms, Discord servers, forums, or support systems must follow all applicable community rules.

YoNi Corporation reserves the right to moderate, remove, or restrict community access for behavior deemed harmful to the platform or community.

20. Contact Information

For questions regarding these Terms or the Rework Store, please contact the official Rework support team through available support channels.

21. Final Agreement

These Terms constitute the complete agreement between you and YoNi Corporation regarding the use of the Rework Store.

If any provision of these Terms is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full effect.
